chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A status attribute that indicates the current lifecycle state of an entity, commonly represented as active or inactive (and in other contexts as a set of ordered statuses such as PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Key Attributes:
- Active/inactive status | Key Attributes:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUST_ID column in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table, used as the unique customer identifier and referenced by related tables as a foreign key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing a buyer or client in business transactions, uniquely identified by a Customer ID and eligible to receive refunds when orders are cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER | Key Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login) | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Related Concepts: CustomerAddress, SalesOrder | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Related Concepts: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
 | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund:

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer's address that serves as the destination for shipments and is associated with a customer within the order/shipment domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Related Concepts: CustomerAddress, SalesOrder | Related Concepts: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single item within a sales order or similar order document, detailing the product, quantity, unit price at the time of order, and the computed extended amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The product identifier field in an order line item, used to link a specific purchased product to a particular line item in a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | ORDER LINE ITEM
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Business Context: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | Key Attributes:
- Unique line identifier | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Product | Key Attributes:
- Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Key Attributes:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Or

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Payment entity represents a monetary transaction associated with a Sales Order, capturing the payment ID, method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Sales Order Header is the top-level record for a customer order, identified by ORDER_ID and linked to the customer (CUST_ID), used to relate order line items and payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is a delivery unit associated with a Sales Order, identified by a unique shipment ID, containing details such as source warehouse, destination, shipped timestamp, tracking number, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Examples**:
- Shipment #S-001 containing 2 items from Warehouse WH-EU-01
- Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347 | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Cannot Be Shipped
entities_post_resolution.definition: A business rule that prohibits shipping an order until payment has been confirmed.
synonyms: Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Business Rules:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | Business Rules:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Policy outlining the conditions under which customers can return products and receive a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

| PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES |
| DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Logged For Audit Purposes

- Status changes are logged for audit purposes

entities_post_resolution.name: Multiple Addresses But
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Orders Into Individual
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Context: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Context: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Category

- Must belong to a valid category before being sold

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional classification, account status, and the timestamp when the customer was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog data including identifiers, naming, category linkage, pricing, and active status for each product.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores product category data and its hierarchical relationship to parent categories, enabling classification and navigation of categories within the product catalog.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores each line item for customer orders, including the product, quantity, unit price, and calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments associated with customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments for customer orders, including association to the order, the warehouse of origin, shipment timestamp, tracking details, and shipment status.
